title: nonea pulla var. persica
intro: Nonea pulla var. persica, also known as Persian nonea, is a plant species in the family Lamiaceae, characterized by its fragrant, white or purple flowers and aromatic leaves. The medicinal properties of Nonea pulla var. persica include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of this plant include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. The herbal preparations of Nonea pulla var. persica include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
